name: Mars 2 lander
fact: First human-built object to reach the Martian surface — by impact. The lander's parachute failed during EDL on 27 November 1971; it crashed at high speed in the Hellas region. The orbiter component continued to return data for eight months. Mars 2 began the Soviet attempt to leapfrog the Americans to the Martian surface in the 1971 launch window.
capability: Demonstrated that reaching Mars's surface — even by impact — was achievable in a single launch window.
